contexts.context: This was a little at <mark>variance</mark> both with servant's appearance and her own laboured toilette...
...would induce habits of romantic dreaming, utterly at <mark>variance</mark> with the stern necessities of life.
..., or whose practice has appeared more decidedly at <mark>variance</mark> with profession. We do not find fault with...
